allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content lldp_gui.py; for \($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match 'def _configure_grid_weights'\) { $i; break } })
PowerShell($lines = Get-Content lldp_gui.py; for \($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match 'def _create_interface_selector'\) { $i; break } })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\dist\\LLDP-scanner.exe" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; if \(-not \($p.HasExited\)\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } else { Write-Host "Process exited with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process .\\dist\\LLDP-scanner.exe -PassThru; Start-Sleep 10; if \($p.HasExited\) { Write-Host "Exited with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" } else { Write-Host "Still running after 10 seconds"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process .\\dist\\LLDP-scanner.exe -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep 5; if \(-not \($p.HasExited\)\) { Stop-Process $p.Id -Force; Write-Host "Killed after 5 seconds" } else { Write-Host "Exited with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "lldp_gui.py" -RedirectStandardOutput "out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "err.txt" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; if \(-not \($p.HasExited\)\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force }; Get-Content .\\err.txt)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process .\\dist\\LLDP-scanner.exe -RedirectStandardOutput "out2.txt" -RedirectStandardError "err2.txt" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; if \(-not \($p.HasExited\)\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force }; Get-Content .\\err2.txt)
